candidate_definitions.text: Democratizing Reinforcement Learning for LLMs
<div align="center">
Best practices for training DeepSeek, Mixtral, Qwen and other MoE models using Megatron Core.

Production-ready training recipes for state-of-the-art MoE models — **DeepSeek-V3**, **Qwen3**, and **Mixtral** — built on 🚀 [Megatron-Core DEV branch](https://github.com/NVIDIA/Megatron-LM/tree/dev).
verl-agent is an extension of veRL, designed for training LLM/VLM agents via RL. verl-agent is also the official code for paper "Group-in-Group Policy Optimization for LLM Agent Training"
InternEvo is an open-sourced lightweight training framework aims to support model pre-training without the need for extensive dependencies.
<div align="center">
Find secrets with Gitleaks 🔑
GraphGen: Enhancing Supervised Fine-Tuning for LLMs with Knowledge-Driven Synthetic Data Generation
InstructionGPT-4
[Lai Wei](https://waltonfuture.github.io/) , Zihao Jiang, [Weiran Huang](https://www.weiranhuang.com/), [Lichao Sun](https://lichao-sun.github.io/).
Efficient Triton Kernels for LLM Training
USP: Unified (a.k.a. Hybrid, 2D) Sequence Parallel Attention for Long Context Transformers Model Training and Inference
[\[Tech Report\] USP: A Unified Sequence Parallelism Approach for Long Context Generative AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.07719)
Run, manage, and scale AI workloads on any AI infrastructure. Use one system to access & manage all AI compute (Kubernetes, Slurm, 20+ clouds, on-prem).
Adan: Adaptive Nesterov Momentum Algorithm for Faster Optimizing Deep Models

This is an official PyTorch implementation of **Adan**. See the paper [here](https://arxiv.org/abs/2208.06677). If you find our adan helpful or heuristic to your projects, please cite this paper and also star this repository. Thanks!
MoBA: Mixture of Block Attention for Long-Context LLMs
DLRover: An Automatic Distributed Deep Learning System
<div id="top" align="center">
The official repo of Aquila2 series proposed by BAAI, including pretrained & chat large language models.
[](https://flagopen.baai.ac.cn/)

Litmus is a comprehensive LLM testing and evaluation tool designed for GenAI Application Development. It provides a robust platform with a user-friendly UI for streamlining the process of building and assessing the performance of your LLM-powered applications.
![DEV](https://github.com/google/litmus/actions/workflows/dev_deploy.yml/badge.svg)
Low-code framework for building custom LLMs, neural networks, and other AI models
